definition: AI contribution to detecting weak signals anomalies hazards system stress and emerging risks

definition: AI contribution to forecasting demand hazards service strain infrastructure risk ecological change or disruption pathways

definition: AI contribution to scenario comparison stress testing pathway exploration and uncertainty analysis

definition: AI contribution to accountable prioritization routing resource allocation triage and planning under uncertainty

definition: Purpose limitation auditability model documentation accountability monitoring incident response and corrective-action capacity
measurement_note: Use model cards audit records incident reports drift review governance board minutes and corrective-action completion

definition: Protection against unequal error exclusion surveillance bias resource misallocation and harm to vulnerable groups
measurement_note: Use disaggregated performance access metrics appeal outcomes vulnerability coverage and participatory equity review

definition: Human review override appeal manual fallback interpretation field validation and accountable decision authority
measurement_note: Use override frequency manual fallback tests training coverage appeal pathways and decision-right clarity

definition: Integration of community knowledge Indigenous knowledge frontline expertise institutional memory and contextual interpretation
measurement_note: Use participatory validation field review community governance representation and local knowledge documentation

definition: Protection against data poisoning adversarial manipulation cyber compromise model theft prompt injection and misuse
measurement_note: Use red-team tests access controls anomaly detection secure deployment incident response and adversarial robustness checks

definition: Risk from drift bias opacity overreliance surveillance misuse environmental burden or automation fragility

definition: Administrative technical governance trust capacity and cost burden required to implement an AI-enabled resilience strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger sequencing feasibility resource and institutional readiness review
